prompt: Turn my pet into a noble from the Renaissance era — oil painting style, ornate collar, moody background, warm tones, and dramatic lighting.
Make my pet a cyberpunk sidekick — neon cityscape background, glowing mechanical details, urban rain, moody lighting, and a futuristic visor.
Focus on pet — high contrast black & white close-up of face with water drops. 35mm lens, 4K HD, black shadow background, sharp profile, 4:3 ratio.
Place my pet in an underwater explorer scene — scuba gear, coral reef, sea creatures swimming by, dreamy aquamarine tones, and gentle bubbles.
Superhero pet portrait, wearing a flowing red cape, dramatic city skyline backdrop, sunset and stormy clouds, cinematic lighting, epic movie poster aesthetic, detailed digital illustration.

A street art mural painting of my pet on a brick wall. Its fur is rendered using bright, swirling multi-colored paint. The background brick wall is covered in yellow, blue, and pink graffiti. The style is bold and edgy, like a professional spray paint piece.
Design a vintage national park travel poster starring my pet — bold text, natural scenery (mountains, trees, rivers), muted retro colors, and WPA-style illustration.
Retro comic book cover featuring a superhero pet, bold colors, dynamic poses, vintage. No additional texts.

Dress my pet in a creative Halloween costume — choose from witch, vampire, pumpkin, skeleton, or ghost. Add fun accessories like hats, capes, or tiny props. Keep the background simple and seasonal (like autumn leaves or a neutral gradient). Make it less scary and more playful/fun.
Fantasy illustration of a pet as a knight, medieval setting, detailed armor, heroic.
Low-poly 3D model of a pet, geometric shapes, minimalist design, modern.
Pixel art of a pet in a video game setting, blocky shapes, bright colors, retro feel.
Minimalist line drawing of a pet sitting, clean lines, simple composition, modern aesthetic.
Pop art style portrait of a pet, bold colors, graphic lines, retro vibe. Without additional text.

An anime-style illustration of pet confidently running forward directly toward the viewer. Dramatic white manga speed lines radiate outward from the borders, creating a sense of dynamic action. The background is a beautiful pastel fantasy landscape filled with blooming cherry blossom trees, falling pink sakura petals, and a colorful sunset sky. Vibrant colors, clean line art, high-energy anime sequence aesthetic, 4k digital art.

A full-body studio portrait of a happy pet standing upright on all fours, wearing a highly detailed white NASA astronaut spacesuit. The suit features realistic fabric folds, a clear glass bubble helmet revealing the pet smiling face and open mouth, and patches on the shoulders including a NASA logo and an American flag. The background is a deep space studio backdrop with a visible grey studio floor. In the background, a realistic planet Earth is visible on the left and a glowing spiral galaxy on the right, surrounded by a dense field of distant stars and nebulae. High-detail, cinematic studio lighting with subtle reflections on the glass helmet.

A high-quality studio photography shot of a pet sitting proudly in the center, facing forward. Festive birthday party setting. The background is a soft, out-of-focus pastel bokeh blurred with colorful confetti, curling satin party streamers hanging down, and floating balloons in primary colors. In the foreground, a small elegant birthday cake with white frosting and lit candles is placed to the side. Bright, even studio lighting, vivid colors, highly detailed fur texture, joyful and celebratory atmosphere. Leaving empty space at the top center for text overlay. --ar 2:3

A cozy indoor photo of a pet wearing a red Christmas sweater. The pet is lying on a thick red knit blanket on a sofa. In the background, a Christmas tree with warm twinkling lights is softly blurred. Cozy and warm holiday atmosphere.

A beautiful indoor photo of a pet sitting proudly on a red pillow on the floor. In the background, there is a brightly lit Christmas tree with gifts on one side, and a cozy stone fireplace with a burning fire on the other side. Festive, elegant holiday setting, warm lighting, centered composition.

A cute indoor photo of a pet dressed as a farmer, wearing a straw hat and a red bandana. The pet is sitting happily inside an old wooden barn next to a vintage red tractor, with large stacks of hay bales behind it. Warm, sunny light is streaming in from the barn door, creating a cozy rustic atmosphere.

A cute and heroic indoor photo of a pet dressed as a firefighter, wearing a red firefighter uniform with reflective stripes and a yellow helmet. The pet is sitting proudly in the middle of a fire station floor. A large red fire truck and station equipment are softly blurred in the background. Bright, professional lighting.

A high-quality studio photograph of a cute pet sitting inside a Japanese martial arts dojo. The pet is dressed in a miniature white martial arts uniform (gi) with a black belt tied around its waist. The background shows a minimalist dojo wall with Japanese hanging scrolls and smooth wooden floors. Realistic, clear lighting, 8k resolution.

A close-up, eye-level shot of a glamorous pet sitting confidently on a red carpet at a celebrity gala event. The pet is accessorized with oversized, round, gold-rimmed dark sunglasses and multiple strands of a classic white pearl necklace around its neck. Next to the pet sits a tiny, luxury designer leather handbag with a metallic clasp. In the background, a blurred crowd of paparazzi in suits holds up cameras with bright, glowing camera flashes creating a dramatic bokeh effect. The setting features a grand building entrance with a red carpet flanked by golden stanchions and velvet ropes. Cinematic lighting, hyper-realistic details, vibrant colors, and a glamorous, humorous atmosphere.

A bright, sunny top-down photograph of a cute pet sitting next to a swimming pool. The pet is looking up and smiling, wearing a straw beach hat decorated with tropical red and white flowers. Clean wooden deck background, crystal-clear blue pool water in the corner, joyful summer vacation vibe.

A realistic travel photograph of a pet sitting on a cobblestone street in front of the Eiffel tower. The pet is wearing a Hawaiian floral shirt, a straw tourist hat, and has a vintage camera hanging from its neck. Bright daytime lighting, sharp focus on the pet, with a beautiful architectural background.

A minimalist 3D papercut illustration of a pet exploring a tropical jungle river on a raft. Pop-up book style, clean layered cardboard textures, solid colors, soft shadows, whimsical and adventurous atmosphere.
A cozy winter snow globe on a windowsill containing a tiny,  pet standing in the snow next to miniature evergreen trees, warm golden sunlight, bokeh background, macro photography.

A custom die-cut tufted yarn rug shaped like the head of an adorable pet. The rug features a highly detailed, textured, and thick loop pile texture. The pet has large, expressive, glossy eyes, detailed fur patterns in, delicate whiskers, and soft pink inner ears. Flat lay overhead shot, the rug is lying flat on a smooth, neutral gray concrete floor. Studio lighting, clean composition, cozy textile art aesthetic.

A 3D vinyl collectible figurine of a cute chibi pet, stylized in the fashion of a Funko Pop or Youtooz figure. The figurine features oversized, glossy black button eyes, a smooth matte plastic texture, and a cheerful expression with a tiny tongue sticking out. The pet figurine is standing on a circular black display tier inside a clear, transparent acrylic display cube box. High-quality 3D digital render, clean isometric view, studio lighting, isolated on a solid light grey background, product photography style.

A beautiful watercolor portrait of a pet. The style is traditional watercolor painting on textured paper, featuring delicate line work, soft color washes in sepia, grey, and muted brown tones, with artistic paint splatters and gentle drips bleeding into a clean white background. Realistic fur details mixed with loose, fluid brushstrokes. High-detail, fine art, warm and serene atmosphere.

An isometric 3D voxel art illustration of a cute pet sitting down. The entire animal is made out of tiny blocks, giving it a pixelated 3D appearance. The background is a solid, soft gradient color with a faint shadow underneath the pet. Bright, clean, and cheerful lighting.

Transform my pet in the photo into a soft, high-quality plush toy, with visual appearance and physical traits of the animal consistent with the original image — except it should have an oversized head, a small body, and short limbs. It is made of fuzzy fabric, with embroidered facial features, and is shown sitting or standing against a neutral background. The expression is cute or expressive, and it is wearing [a wizard outfit] and has [a magical staff and a wizard hat] as accessories. The lighting is soft and even, with a realistic, collectible toy look. Centered, full-body view.

Transform my pet from the photo into a handcrafted crochet doll with a slightly rustic and charming look, while preserving the visual appearance and physical traits of the PET on the original. The texture should highlight the handmade crochet stitches, using soft yarn and natural colors that lovingly replicate the pet’s unique details. The eyes should be button-style or embroidered, conveying a sweet and heartwarming expression. The doll is shown sitting or standing in a friendly pose, wearing a cozy little scarf as an accessory. Set against a neutral background that enhances the artisanal feel. Warm, cuddly, and collectible style.

A cinematic, detailed photograph of a cute pet sitting on a dirt path in a spooky, misty forest at night. The pet is wearing an ornate dark blue cape with a floral pattern and a bright orange trim. Flanking the pet on the ground are two glowing, carved Halloween jack-o'-lanterns with eerie, lit-up smiling faces. In the background, dark silhouettes of bare trees fade into a thick, blue-toned fog, under the soft, diffused glow of a large full moon. The atmosphere is mysterious, moody, and enchanting, with cinematic lighting focusing on the pet.

A professional, detailed studio photograph of a cute pet sitting proudly in a modern kitchen while wearing a large, white fabric chef's hat. In the foreground, a wooden cutting board holds freshly baked pastries, a cluster of red cherry tomatoes on the vine, and fresh green herbs. Red bell peppers sit to the side. The background features a softly blurred, warm kitchen setting with dark cabinets, a stainless steel stove, and various cooking utensils. The lighting is bright and clean, capturing a charming and whimsical culinary theme.

Turn my pet into a detailed, close-up photograph sitting upright inside the cockpit of a vintage, teal-colored open-top vehicle or airplane. The pet is wearing a custom-fitted aviator helmet made of brown leather, complete with vintage goggles pushed up onto its forehead. The animal is looking directly at the camera with a focused expression. The background shows a soft, natural outdoor setting under a slightly overcast sky, emphasizing a whimsical, adventurous co-pilot theme.

Turn my pet into a detailed full-body photograph of an anthropomorphic pet standing upright like a fantasy warrior or ranger. The pet is wearing intricate leather armor tunics with fur trim, secured by detailed leather straps, buckles, and a belt with a small pouch. It wears a long, heavy red fabric cloak with a thick fur collar. In one hand, it grips a tall wooden spear with a prominent metallic spade-shaped blade resting on the ground, while a quiver filled with arrows is visible on its back. The character stands in an outdoor courtyard near a small campfire flickering in the bottom right corner. The lighting is warm and cinematic, casting a heroic and adventurous mood.

Turn my pet into a detailed, full-body photograph of an anthropomorphic pet standing upright on the rocky, barren surface of the moon. The pet is dressed in a highly detailed, retro-style canvas spacesuit complete with a thick neck ring collar, straps, patches, and a life-support control box on its chest, leaving its head and paws exposed. Next to the pet is a weathered, rusty white space capsule or lunar lander module with red and yellow stripes. The background is the pitch-black void of outer space with a small, glowing distant planet or moon visible in the sky. The lighting is stark and dramatic, casting sharp shadows on the moon rocks to create a cinematic sci-fi atmosphere.

Turn my pet into a detailed, close-up portrait photograph of a majestic pet looking noble and gazing slightly off-camera. The pet is wearing an ornate, intricately designed golden crown adorned with colorful embedded gems in shades of red, blue, and teal, featuring a rich crimson red velvet fabric dome underneath. The background is dark, moody, and softly blurred, with a subtle hint of warm, golden bokeh to create a regal and classical oil-painting aesthetic. The lighting is soft and directional, accentuating the fine texture of the pet's fur.
